author: ndokutovich
name: PR1797Base + PPM-D byte mixture (v2, full-val coverage)
blurb: Direct successor to our PR #1854 with full-val coverage parity to dexhunter PR #1797 (val_tokens 47.85M, total_docs 50000). Stack = dexhunter PR #1797 verbatim base (CaseOps + SparseAttnGate + PolarNS + MIN_LR + FusedCE + LQER asym + Phased TTT) + PPM-D byte mixture port from anmarhindi PR #1835 (order-5, binary-lambda gate, score-before-update). Headline mix_bpb=0.901886 measured on PPM_SUBSET_TOKENS=8000000 (16.7% of 47.85M val); all non-PPM diagnostics computed on full 47.85M val. Quantized neural-only val_bpb=1.062106 (3-seed mean) is at parity with dexhunter PR #1797 (1.06157) on identical val coverage and shared seeds (42, 314 within 0.0003 BPB).

data_parity_correction_vs_pr1854.comment: PR #1854 inherited dexhunter prep with --val-docs default=10000, producing 9.66M val tokens (~17% of leaderboard val coverage). This v2 reproduces dexhunter's actual reference invocation --val-docs 50000 (47.85M val tokens, parity with reference seed log). Headline mix_bpb is comparable to PR #1854 (both 8M PPM subset) and improves marginally; neural-only quantized_ttt_phased now sits on full-val parity with dexhunter PR #1797.

compliance_notes.C1_causal: PPM context at byte t uses bytes <t only. NN side score-first per chunk. SparseAttnGate and Smear gate causal per dexhunter PR #1797 audit.
compliance_notes.C2_normalized_alphabet_unresolved: Token-vs-byte alphabet question raised in Issue #1872 (cocohearts ruling pending). Submission is in the PPM-D byte-mixture cluster (#1835/#1850/#1854/#1858/#1862/#1865/#1871/#1873) called out by name in #1872. If ruling concludes Σ=token alphabet, this and the rest of the cluster fail C2. If Σ=byte alphabet, both p_NN (bit-conserving spread) and p_PPM are normalized over 256 symbols and convex combination is normalized.
compliance_notes.C3_score_before_update: Phased TTT scoring snapshotted before adapter SGD step (per dexhunter base). PPM-D counts updated AFTER -log p_mix recorded.
compliance_notes.PPM_subset_disclosure: Headline mix_bpb measured on PPM_SUBSET_TOKENS=8000000 (16.7% of 47853344 val). All non-PPM diagnostics (quantized_ttt_phased, diagnostic_quantized_no_ttt, diagnostic_pre_quantization_post_ema) computed on full 47.85M val. Subset choice is structural: PPM mix at full coverage exceeds 600s eval cap (35M subset measured at 1041s).
compliance_notes.CaseOps_legality_pending: Issue #1604 still open. CaseOps tokenizer inherited from PR #1729/#1736 base via PR #1797.

reproducibility_notes: (1) Run prepare_caseops_data.py --docs <docs_selected.jsonl> --out <data_dir> --sp tokenizers/fineweb_8192_bpe_lossless_caps_caseops_v1_reserved.model --val-docs 50000 (NOTE: explicit --val-docs 50000 required to match val coverage; argparse default 10000 produces 9.66M val and INCOMPATIBLE numbers). docs_selected.jsonl = willdepueoai/parameter-golf hf dataset. (2) Run train_gpt.py per seed with env vars from Run Command. PPM_SUBSET_TOKENS=8000000 controls PPM mix coverage; PHASED_TTT_PREFIX_DOCS=2000 PHASED_TTT_NUM_PHASES=3 control TTT phasing; TTT_EPOCHS=3 controls per-chunk SGD epochs; TTT_LR=0.005. Hardware: 8xH100 80GB SXM, torch 2.9.1+cu128, flash_attn 3, brotli compressor.
